authority: Explicit founder instruction from Aidan Coleman
supersedes_scope: The predecessor-only master interpretation of CERT-GOV-PRED-001 v1.0.0. Predecessor controls are retained as a control family within this cumulative standard.

coverage.release_rule: Build 0052 RC6 is blocked until canonical matrix-or-hash-bound-ledger historical coverage and all Windows PowerShell 5.1 transaction gates are validated.

lessons.control: Optional or migrating JSON properties must be written with Add-Member -Force rather than direct assignment under StrictMode
lessons.defect: The first final close-out run failed because CONTINUITY_CHECKPOINT_DELTA.json did not contain closure_gate and direct assignment was blocked.
lessons.corrective_action: Recover only authorised partial files, then create or replace closure_gate through Add-Member -Force.
lessons.preventive_control: Close-out schema-variance regression test and Set-OptionalProperty helper.
lessons.defect_or_risk: The first final close-out run failed because CONTINUITY_CHECKPOINT_DELTA.json did not contain closure_gate and direct assignment was blocked.
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.
lessons.regression_control: Validate that the migrated historical lesson remains present, traceable to its source matrix and is not silently dropped.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Null, scalar, singleton and generic collection outputs behave differently for .Count, indexing and property projection.
lessons.root_cause: PowerShell pipeline cardinality and generic .NET collections were used without normalisation.
lessons.preventive_control: Wrap uncertain results in @(...), validate count before indexing, avoid StrictMode-unsafe projection on empty collections and use explicit .ToArray() for generic collections where applicable.
lessons.regression_control: Zero, one and many item tests for every operator-critical collection.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Legacy lesson retained from control: OPEN_ACTION_ESCALATION
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.
lessons.regression_control: Validate that the migrated historical lesson remains present, traceable to its source matrix and is not silently dropped.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Urgent precedence
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.
lessons.regression_control: Validate that the migrated historical lesson remains present, traceable to its source matrix and is not silently dropped.

lessons.control: Memory-only Python compilation plus generator execution
lessons.regression: bundle generator creates manifest and Markdown summary
lessons.defect_or_risk: Generated source must be executable
lessons.preventive_control: Memory-only Python compilation plus generator execution
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.
lessons.regression_control: Validate that the migrated historical lesson remains present, traceable to its source matrix and is not silently dropped.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Transactional safety
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.
lessons.regression_control: Validate that the migrated historical lesson remains present, traceable to its source matrix and is not silently dropped.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Human reopening authority
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.
lessons.regression_control: Validate that the migrated historical lesson remains present, traceable to its source matrix and is not silently dropped.

lessons.control: Asset Intent Manifest exact paths and provenance
lessons.defect_or_risk: Exact ownership only
lessons.preventive_control: Asset Intent Manifest exact paths and provenance
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.
lessons.regression_control: Validate that the migrated historical lesson remains present, traceable to its source matrix and is not silently dropped.

lessons.lesson: Synthetic predecessor fixtures must never overlap current package paths
lessons.control: Build predecessor fixture paths from exact prior build identity and compare them against the current Asset Intent Manifest before repository creation
lessons.regression: Manifest-to-fixture set intersection is empty and executable predecessor dry-run returns DRY_RUN_VALIDATED with no conflicts
lessons.defect_or_risk: Synthetic predecessor fixtures must never overlap current package paths
lessons.preventive_control: Build predecessor fixture paths from exact prior build identity and compare them against the current Asset Intent Manifest before repository creation
lessons.control_family: Synthetic Predecessor Fixtures Must Never Overlap Current Package Paths
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.
lessons.regression_control: Validate that the migrated historical lesson remains present, traceable to its source matrix and is not silently dropped.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A failed import could leave no recoverable state or store backups inside the repository being modified.
lessons.root_cause: Backup location and retention were not transactionally governed.
lessons.preventive_control: Create backups outside the repository before apply; retain/copy failed or unresolved backups to the locked external backup path; remove temporary backups only after validation and green closure under retention rules.
lessons.regression_control: Backup path exclusion, restore test and failure-retention test.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A governance source baseline can be hash-consistent yet violate its own Git whitespace controls.
lessons.root_cause: The source bundle was not staged in a synthetic Git index and subjected to both exact Git whitespace checks before being called locked.
lessons.preventive_control: Every source baseline and corrective governance package must pass final-byte synthetic Git staging with conversion disabled, no trailing whitespace and raw/index blob equality.
lessons.regression_control: Synthetic repository staging, git diff --check, git diff --cached --check and exact staged-blob comparison before release.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Commit subjects could be shortened, paraphrased or pushed without final validation.
lessons.root_cause: Commit naming and push were treated as operator discretion rather than locked evidence.
lessons.preventive_control: Use exact reserved commit subject, stage only validated changes, commit after all checks and verify local push path before founder-side push.
lessons.regression_control: Exact subject comparison, committed tree hash check and temporary remote push regression.

lessons.defect_or_risk: New chats could restart from stale builds, miss open defects or repeat settled decisions.
lessons.root_cause: The active checkpoint was not updated at every state transition and defect.
lessons.preventive_control: Increment and update the authoritative continuity checkpoint on authorisation, generation, reissue, import, validation, commit/push, green closure, defect and next-action changes.
lessons.regression_control: Current build, last closed build, open defect, immediate action and following action must reconcile across build records and source pack.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Operator instructions can be fragmented, require a second payload search, or omit the decisive endpoint and commit action.
lessons.root_cause: Delivery was not consistently self-contained around the founder workflow.
lessons.preventive_control: Every downloadable Certiaura artifact is one self-contained ZIP with SHA-256, capability, validation, one executable Windows PowerShell 5.1 block, exact endpoint, reserved commit message and next action. Do not make a script ZIP search for a second payload ZIP when embedding is possible.
lessons.regression_control: Delivery and ZIP inventory validators prove the complete executable payload is present in the one delivered ZIP.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Multiple byte-identical downloaded ZIP copies can cause false ambiguity.
lessons.root_cause: Package discovery counted matching paths as distinct identities despite exact SHA-256 equality.
lessons.preventive_control: Normalise and deduplicate candidate full paths, permit one or more copies only when each selected candidate has the exact required SHA-256, select deterministically, and report the duplicate count.
lessons.regression_control: Positive test with multiple identical copies and blocking negative tests for zero exact matches and wrong hashes.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A transactional importer can roll back correctly but return a blank operator-facing failure message, requiring a separate diagnostic cycle.
lessons.root_cause: The RC3 importer wrote rollback_reason only to JSON and returned exit code 3 without printing a stable failure code or report location to stderr; the wrapper did not read the report before throwing.
lessons.preventive_control: Every non-zero transactional result must print a stable failure code, rollback reason, report path and backup path to stderr. Windows wrappers must read the report on failure and include transaction_status, rollback_completed, failure_code, rollback_reason and backup_path in the thrown error.
lessons.regression_control: Force a post-apply exception, require exit code 3, stable BUILD_0052_TRANSACTION_ROLLED_BACK output, exact simulated rollback reason in the report, clean repository restoration and wrapper-visible failure details.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Whitespace defects, unstaged changes, unexpected deletions or runtime artefacts could survive validation and enter a commit.
lessons.root_cause: Only partial Git checks were run or checks occurred before final staging.
lessons.preventive_control: Stage all intended changes, run git diff --check and git diff --cached --check, verify no unexpected deletions, no unstaged changes and no untracked runtime artefacts.
lessons.regression_control: Synthetic commit and local push-path regression against a temporary bare remote.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Settled controls were at risk of being recreated, duplicated or silently changed between chats and builds.
lessons.root_cause: Reliance on chat continuity and fragmented source documents rather than a mandatory read order and change-control hierarchy.
lessons.preventive_control: Use the latest locked source hierarchy; extend or explicitly amend existing governance and prohibit competing charters, registers and release systems.
lessons.regression_control: Preflight verifies mandatory sources, versions, canonical paths and amendment status before package generation.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Build closure or next-build initiation could occur before evidence or require repeated founder instructions after closure.
lessons.root_cause: The definitive founder phrase and automation sequence were not consistently encoded.
lessons.preventive_control: GREEN is the definitive close-out phrase only after canonical import, validation, commit, push and GitHub Actions evidence; then mark ACTIONS_GREEN_CLOSED and immediately begin the next build.
lessons.regression_control: Closure script checks evidence bundle before accepting GREEN and updates current/next build atomically.

lessons.defect_or_risk: The wrong ZIP can be executed, while multiple byte-identical copies can create false ambiguity and unnecessary operator failure.
lessons.root_cause: Filename selection was insufficient and a later control incorrectly required exactly one filesystem copy despite identical approved content hashes.
lessons.preventive_control: Zero exact-hash matches fails. One or more distinct paths with the same required SHA-256 are accepted after path deduplication; select deterministically and report copy count. Distinct hashes are never interchangeable.
lessons.regression_control: No-match, one-match, multiple identical-hash, overlapping-root and wrong-hash fixtures.

lessons.control_family: Historical lessons coverage without fabricated matrices
lessons.defect_or_risk: A cumulative lessons updater can block a valid canonical repository because older builds predate retained per-build lesson matrices, or can be weakened by fabricating replacement matrices after the fact.
lessons.root_cause: RC5 equated complete historical coverage exclusively with physical matrix discovery even though the locked cumulative ledger already contained exact lessons attributed to Builds 0039, 0040 and 0043-0046.
lessons.preventive_control: Use per-build matrices when canonically present. For explicitly declared legacy builds with no canonical matrix, accept only an exact lesson-ID set already present in the authoritative cumulative ledger, bind that set by SHA-256, validate every required field and origin attribution, record the coverage mode, and prohibit synthetic matrix creation.
lessons.regression_control: Run the updater with canonical matrices absent for the declared legacy builds and require exact hash-bound ledger coverage to pass; remove a declaration, alter an ID, change the digest or remove the build origin and require a stable blocking failure.

lessons.defect_or_risk: After a failed exact-hash package search, separately pasted commands can continue and reuse a stale PackagePath from an earlier run.
lessons.root_cause: Interactive PowerShell executes separately submitted pasted statements even after a terminating error; the launcher was not contained in one invoked script scope.
lessons.preventive_control: Wrap complete operator launchers in one invoked script block or packaged script, initialise critical variables inside that scope, and display the selected filename and independently recalculated SHA-256 immediately before extraction.
lessons.regression_control: Simulate zero exact-hash matches with a stale outer PackagePath and prove no extraction command executes and no stale variable is reused.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Lessons remained narrative, local to one chat or omitted at closure, allowing repeat defects.
lessons.root_cause: No cumulative source, merge mechanism or closure gate tied lessons to executable controls.
lessons.preventive_control: Every build must create LESSONS_LEARNED_REVIEW.md and LESSONS_LEARNED_CONTROL_MATRIX.json, merge them into this cumulative source and update the continuity checkpoint.
lessons.regression_control: Automated historical coverage and parity validator; build closure blocked if current lessons are absent, unmerged or lack executable regressions.

lessons.defect_or_risk: The same defect class can recur despite narrative controls.
lessons.root_cause: Controls checked wording or self-generated evidence rather than independent runtime facts.
lessons.preventive_control: A repeated defect must increment occurrence count, identify why the prior control failed and introduce a structurally stronger independent control.
lessons.regression_control: Repeat detector compares control families and root-cause fingerprints; unchanged preventive/regression text blocks release.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A valid historical lessons matrix can be rejected because it predates fields introduced by the cumulative lessons schema.
lessons.root_cause: Build 0052 RC3 required control_family and every current canonical field in all historical matrices without a version-aware migration path; canonical Build 0041 therefore failed with LESSON_REQUIRED_FIELD_MISSING.
lessons.preventive_control: Use a version-aware historical lessons adapter that records every alias and backfilled field with source path, build number, record index and deterministic basis. Keep the current-build matrix strict and prohibit current-schema migration.
lessons.regression_control: Run positive fixtures for Build 0041-style missing control_family, scalar origins, aliases and deterministic identifier backfill; run negative fixtures for empty legacy records and any current Build 0052 missing required field.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Build ownership could be inferred from filenames, build substrings or shared folders rather than declared exact paths.
lessons.root_cause: Ownership scans used broad discovery instead of a machine-readable exact path contract.
lessons.preventive_control: Every package file must appear exactly once in the current build Asset Intent Manifest with classification, action and provenance.
lessons.regression_control: Manifest/package exact set equality, duplicate-path detection and undeclared-file rejection.

lessons.defect_or_risk: PREDECESSOR_MANIFEST_PATH_INVALID
lessons.root_cause: Current-schema-only repository_path assumption
lessons.preventive_control: Schema detection with path normalisation and ambiguity/traversal/duplicate/case-collision rejection
lessons.regression_control: repository_path, path, string and object-map positives; alias conflict and traversal negatives
lessons.operator_friction: Founder-side canonical Windows regression blocked before import
lessons.corrective_action: Strict version-aware canonical Git manifest adapter

lessons.defect_or_risk: Formal assets could be imported without registration, or a competing register could be created.
lessons.root_cause: File import and register reconciliation were treated as separate activities.
lessons.preventive_control: Resolve one canonical Master Asset Register and reconcile files, Universal Asset Identifiers, relationships, statuses and provenance in the same rollback-safe transaction.
lessons.regression_control: Dry run reports creations, updates, preserved identifiers, duplicates, orphans and expected totals; apply rolls back all components on failure.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Non-fatal Git stderr warnings can be promoted to terminating NativeCommandError records.
lessons.root_cause: The wrapper merged stderr while ErrorActionPreference was Stop and treated the PowerShell record rather than the native exit code as authoritative.
lessons.preventive_control: All operator-critical native commands use one wrapper that temporarily sets non-terminating error handling, captures stdout and stderr as text, restores the previous preference, and decides success from the native exit code plus exact endpoint.
lessons.regression_control: Run Git commands that emit stderr with exit code zero and verify the wrapper continues; separately verify non-zero exit codes block.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Corrections could consume unnecessary build numbers or lose the original package identity.
lessons.root_cause: No locked distinction between new capability, phase suffix and corrective reissue.
lessons.preventive_control: Use whole build numbers for materially distinct integrated work packages; use suffixes only for true phases; retain build number and full title for corrections and identify RC lineage.
lessons.regression_control: Manifest and build record validator compare number, title, RC lineage and intended action.

lessons.defect_or_risk: OneDrive can interfere with transactional repository writes or remain stopped after failure.
lessons.root_cause: Sync process state was not captured and restored in a finally block.
lessons.preventive_control: Record whether OneDrive was running, stop it only for controlled writes and restart it in finally using verified executable candidates.
lessons.regression_control: Running/not-running, stop failure and restart fallback scenarios.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Build-number substring matching, shared-folder globbing and broad recursive scans could misattribute predecessor or unrelated files to the current build.
lessons.root_cause: Convenience discovery logic replaced exact manifest ownership.
lessons.preventive_control: Validate build-owned files only through the exact current Asset Intent Manifest; repository-wide validators must be separately identified.
lessons.regression_control: Negative tests place similarly named predecessor and unrelated files in shared folders and require exclusion.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A regression launcher can resolve helper scripts beside the ZIP or caller rather than inside the extracted final package.
lessons.root_cause: Relative path resolution was based on the wrong script/package context.
lessons.preventive_control: Resolve all package helpers from the extracted package root and verify their hashes against the final ZIP manifest.
lessons.regression_control: Run launcher from unrelated working directories with similarly named external scripts present and require packaged helpers only.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Current-build paths or metadata can contaminate predecessor fixtures and create false ownership evidence.
lessons.root_cause: Synthetic predecessor fixtures were not compared path-for-path with the current Asset Intent Manifest and exact prior build identity.
lessons.preventive_control: Enumerate every predecessor fixture path, require empty intersection with current manifest unless an exact approved update exists, and verify exact prior build number, provenance, commit subject, Universal Asset Identifiers and repository paths.
lessons.regression_control: Executable predecessor-aware dry run returns DRY_RUN_VALIDATED with zero conflicts and unchanged predecessor hashes.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A candidate can define its own predecessor truth and self-certify invented paths.
lessons.root_cause: Build 0052 RC1 manually declared predecessor paths instead of deriving them from the exact canonical Git commit and closed snapshot.
lessons.preventive_control: Prohibit packaged predecessor fixtures and candidate-authored identity files. Resolve the exact Build 0051 commit by exact subject, require it to be an ancestor of the closed snapshot, extract the manifest and every fixture byte from Git objects, bind the evidence to the final ZIP SHA-256, compare all path and UAI sets, and retain both raw and unauthorised intersections.
lessons.regression_control: Generate predecessor evidence at runtime from a temporary clone of canonical history; run fifteen blocking mutation tests; verify fixture hashes before dry run, after forced rollback and after clean reapply; fail if canonical Git evidence is unavailable.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Static PASS reports can certify controls that were never executed against the final ZIP or canonical predecessor.
lessons.root_cause: Validation reports were package-authored artefacts rather than outputs of the final release controller.
lessons.preventive_control: Generate PASS evidence only at runtime from final ZIP bytes and authenticated canonical sources; canonical source unavailable is a blocking outcome.
lessons.regression_control: Tampered report, rebuilt ZIP, unavailable repository and prewritten PASS negative tests.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Positive fixture tests can pass while invented paths, wrong hashes, wrong commits and current-build contamination remain undetected.
lessons.root_cause: Negative tests did not challenge the candidate against the real predecessor snapshot.
lessons.preventive_control: Mandatory negative tests cover invented/missing/additional paths, modified bytes, empty manifest with non-empty identity, wrong build/provenance/subject/SHA/UAI, current path contamination, unapproved intersection, static PASS and unavailable canonical source.
lessons.regression_control: Every negative fixture must return its exact blocking failure code.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A package could compare its manifest to a development workspace rather than to the final ZIP, allowing missing or extra packaged files.
lessons.root_cause: Validation source was not bound to final package bytes.
lessons.preventive_control: Validate inventory, manifest, checksums, routes and scripts against the final ZIP itself.
lessons.regression_control: Final-ZIP extraction and exact file/hash equality; any rebuild invalidates prior evidence.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Scripts that pass on newer PowerShell or non-Windows environments can fail in the founder's actual Windows PowerShell 5.1 workflow.
lessons.root_cause: Pre-delivery testing did not execute the complete real operator path in the target shell.
lessons.preventive_control: Execute the final delivered ZIP, exact launcher and exact child script through the complete Windows PowerShell 5.1 operator path, including parser, package identity, extraction, OneDrive, dry run/apply, reconciliation, tests, Git, commit and push-path controls.
lessons.regression_control: Exact delivered-file execution with endpoint equality and fixtures for stderr warnings, quoting, duplicate package discovery and line-ending behaviour.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A successful multi-line native command can be falsely reported as missing a required token when collection-valued -notmatch is used as a Boolean.
lessons.root_cause: PowerShell comparison operators applied to arrays return the elements satisfying the comparison. Non-matching lines produced a non-empty array even though another line contained the required rollback token.
lessons.preventive_control: Normalise captured native output to one deterministic scalar string before regex matching, or explicitly count matching elements. Direct Boolean use of collection-valued -match or -notmatch is prohibited.
lessons.regression_control: Use a multi-line fixture with unrelated lines before and after one required token and require the positive assertion to pass; use a token-free fixture and require the negative assertion to pass. Static tests reject direct .Output -notmatch usage.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Compilation and tests could create __pycache__, .pyc or .pyo artefacts in the repository.
lessons.root_cause: Standard Python compilation and execution wrote bytecode to disk.
lessons.preventive_control: Use memory-only compilation or Python -B/PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE and scan for runtime artefacts before staging.
lessons.regression_control: No __pycache__, .pyc or .pyo before and after every synthetic and operator workflow stage.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Windows PowerShell 5.1 can corrupt quoted inline Python source.
lessons.root_cause: Non-trivial Python was passed through python -c across the Windows native-command boundary.
lessons.preventive_control: Invoke committed Python files or an ASCII LF temporary harness only, always use -B, capture the exit code, require the exact endpoint and delete the harness in finally.
lessons.regression_control: The exact delivered Windows PowerShell 5.1 script invokes only file-based Python entry points and verifies no __pycache__, pyc or pyo artefacts.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Python resolution can fail under StrictMode when command objects or properties are absent or cardinality is unexpected.
lessons.root_cause: Resolve-Python logic assumed a single command object and directly projected optional properties.
lessons.preventive_control: Normalise Get-Command results, select one supported command deterministically and guard Source/Path access.
lessons.regression_control: Tests with python only, py only, both, neither and multiple command results under StrictMode.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Administrative records could be left at repository root or fragmented across non-canonical folders.
lessons.root_cause: Build-specific records lacked a single locked destination.
lessons.preventive_control: Route all build administrative records under Documentation/Build_Records/[BUILD_NUMBER]/.
lessons.regression_control: Asset Intent Manifest and package inventory enforce exact build-record paths.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A ZIP can be technically well-formed yet fail the real operator workflow or canonical predecessor assumptions.
lessons.root_cause: Release gates accepted component-level checks without independent end-to-end execution.
lessons.preventive_control: Do not deliver until package self-validation, realistic synthetic import, canonical predecessor evidence, forced rollback, clean reapply, Master Asset Register reconciliation, exact validators/tests, Git checks, local commit/push path and target-shell workflow pass as far as possible outside the canonical repository.
lessons.regression_control: Final controller has only CANDIDATE_RELEASE_VALIDATED or CANDIDATE_RELEASE_BLOCKED and binds evidence to final ZIP SHA-256.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Importing onto a dirty, stale or unexpected repository HEAD can mix builds or invalidate predecessor assumptions.
lessons.root_cause: Repository state was not anchored before import.
lessons.preventive_control: Require valid Git repository, clean status, fetch, fast-forward-only pull and exact expected predecessor/closed snapshot reconciliation.
lessons.regression_control: Dirty tree, divergent branch, wrong HEAD and unreachable predecessor tests.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A package could pass dry run but fail after partial apply without proving complete restoration and repeatability.
lessons.root_cause: Happy-path testing omitted forced post-apply failure and reapplication.
lessons.preventive_control: Run dry run, forced post-apply failure, automatic rollback, hash/state verification and clean reapply before release.
lessons.regression_control: Executable rollback injection must restore repository, register, relationships and control records exactly, then reapply cleanly.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Non-ASCII characters in PowerShell or CMD files can cause parser or console compatibility failures on Windows PowerShell 5.1.
lessons.root_cause: Generated scripts included typographic characters or non-portable encoding.
lessons.preventive_control: PowerShell and CMD files must be ASCII-only and parser-checked before release.
lessons.regression_control: ASCII byte scan and Windows PowerShell 5.1 parser precheck.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Generated or delivered packages could be mistaken for installed or closed builds.
lessons.root_cause: Build-state terms were used without evidential gates.
lessons.preventive_control: Use PLANNED, GREEN_AUTHORISED, GENERATED, DELIVERED, IMPORTED, REPOSITORY_VALIDATED, COMMITTED_PUSHED and ACTIONS_GREEN_CLOSED exactly.
lessons.regression_control: Closure validator requires canonical import, repository validation, exact commit, push and GitHub Actions evidence before ACTIONS_GREEN_CLOSED.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Direct assignment to an absent property on a deserialised JSON object fails under Windows PowerShell StrictMode.
lessons.root_cause: Scripts assumed optional or migrating properties already existed.
lessons.preventive_control: Test property existence and use Add-Member or an equivalent safe helper before assignment; never project optional properties without guards.
lessons.regression_control: Fixtures with absent, null, scalar and array forms under Set-StrictMode -Version Latest.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Package-only tests could pass while real repositories containing history, unrelated files and existing assets fail.
lessons.root_cause: Synthetic environments were too clean and were built around candidate assumptions.
lessons.preventive_control: Install into a temporary Git repository containing realistic predecessor assets, unrelated historical files, existing shared-folder files and canonical control records.
lessons.regression_control: Prove unrelated and predecessor files remain unchanged through dry run, rollback and clean reapply.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A package could pass positive examples while defective or unsafe examples were not proven to fail.
lessons.root_cause: Testing focused on expected valid data and omitted negative contracts.
lessons.preventive_control: Run exact canonical validators and exact unittest discover commands; valid and conditional examples must pass and deliberately defective examples must fail for the intended reason.
lessons.regression_control: Command ledger records exact commands, exit codes and expected failure codes.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A source updater can recreate trailing whitespace after the source package itself has passed checks.
lessons.root_cause: The previous Markdown renderer emitted two-space hard breaks and did not validate its generated output before atomic replacement.
lessons.preventive_control: The cumulative updater renderer must use blank lines rather than Markdown trailing-space hard breaks, validate every generated line before writing, require LF and one final newline, and subject updated source files to working-tree and staged-index Git checks.
lessons.regression_control: Execute the updater in a synthetic repository, scan generated Markdown and JSON byte-for-byte, run git diff --check and git diff --cached --check, and compare raw working-tree and index object hashes.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Moved, restored, revised, superseded or retired assets could be renumbered or duplicated.
lessons.root_cause: Path changes were confused with asset identity changes.
lessons.preventive_control: Preserve existing Universal Asset Identifiers; allocate new identifiers only for genuinely new assets; quarantine ambiguous matches.
lessons.regression_control: Duplicate identifier, identifier reuse, renumbering, orphan file and orphan register-entry tests.

lessons.defect_or_risk: A package that correctly pre-merges the current build lessons can fail during runtime replay because the updater misclassifies the same build and same origins as a new repeated defect occurrence.
lessons.root_cause: The repeated-defect strengthening gate ran whenever repeat_defect was true, without first determining whether the incoming matrix introduced a genuinely new origin build.
lessons.preventive_control: Treat replay of an already represented origin-build set as an idempotent update. Apply repeated-defect strengthening only when the incoming record introduces at least one new origin build; never use this rule to bypass strict current-schema validation.
lessons.regression_control: Pre-merge the Build 0052 matrix into the cumulative source, replay the identical current matrix and require success with unchanged origins; then add a new origin using unchanged preventive and regression controls and require REPEATED_DEFECT_CONTROL_NOT_STRENGTHENED.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Stale aliases and inconsistent path variables can direct checks to different repositories, packages or extraction folders.
lessons.root_cause: Scripts evolved with multiple names for the same operator-critical path.
lessons.preventive_control: Use one canonical variable name per critical path, pass it explicitly and reject stale aliases.
lessons.regression_control: Static variable allowlist plus runtime equality and path-existence assertions.

lessons.defect_or_risk: Build packages were placed in build-named root folders and could create invalid canonical repository structures.
lessons.root_cause: ZIP filename identity was incorrectly mirrored as an internal wrapper directory.
lessons.preventive_control: Use concise locked ZIP naming, no internal build wrapper and flat repository-relative routing only through approved canonical roots.
lessons.regression_control: ZIP tree preflight rejects wrapper folders, unauthorised roots, duplicate paths and case-only collisions.

lessons.preventive_control: One implementation-bundle ZIP containing the canonical inner package, detached SHA-256 and PowerShell launcher
lessons.regression_test: Verify bundle inventory; launcher's expected hash must match the inner package; inner package must pass the complete release gate
lessons.defect_or_risk: Separate build-package and PowerShell-shortcut downloads
lessons.regression_control: Verify bundle inventory; launcher's expected hash must match the inner package; inner package must pass the complete release gate
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.

lessons.defect: Launcher source was pasted into an interactive shell and lost script-unit semantics
lessons.preventive_control: Normal operator entry is the double-click CMD starter; instructions prohibit interactive source pasting
lessons.regression_test: Implementation bundle read-me and starter provide one executable entry point with native parser precheck
lessons.defect_or_risk: Launcher source was pasted into an interactive shell and lost script-unit semantics
lessons.regression_control: Implementation bundle read-me and starter provide one executable entry point with native parser precheck
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.

lessons.defect: Import wrapper performed broad ZIP rediscovery after the launcher had already verified the package
lessons.preventive_control: Launcher resolves one adjacent package by SHA-256 and hands the explicit path to the import wrapper
lessons.regression_test: Unit test and preflight gate require explicit Package parameter and reject broad download-root discovery
lessons.defect_or_risk: Import wrapper performed broad ZIP rediscovery after the launcher had already verified the package
lessons.regression_control: Unit test and preflight gate require explicit Package parameter and reject broad download-root discovery
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.

lessons.defect: Windows PowerShell 5.1 parser failure caused by non-ASCII UTF-8 source without a byte-order mark
lessons.preventive_control: ASCII-only .ps1/.cmd files plus native PowerShell parser precheck in the double-click starter
lessons.regression_test: Package preflight and unit test reject non-ASCII executable scripts; starter parses launcher before execution
lessons.defect_or_risk: Windows PowerShell 5.1 parser failure caused by non-ASCII UTF-8 source without a byte-order mark
lessons.regression_control: Package preflight and unit test reject non-ASCII executable scripts; starter parses launcher before execution
lessons.root_cause: Not recorded in the legacy matrix; preserved through controlled historical schema migration.

lessons.defect: OneDrive executable path collapsed to a scalar string and [0] returned its first character
